title: parapolystichum smithianum
intro: Parapolystichum smithianum, also known as a species of fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Parapolystichum smithianum include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, or capsules, but more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
